claimText: The Planetary Health Check (PHC) 2025 is released by the Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research (PIK).
evidenceExcerpt: Planetary Health Check 2025 released by Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research (PIK).
examUse: Institution-feature question matching reports to their publishing organizations.

claimText: The Planetary Boundaries framework consists of 9 ecological thresholds that define humanity's safe operating space.
evidenceExcerpt: Planetary Boundaries are 9 ecological thresholds defining humanity's safe operating space.
examUse: Statement-based question on the definition and scope of Planetary Boundaries.

claimText: According to the Planetary Health Check 2025, 7 of the 9 Planetary Boundaries have been transgressed.
examUse: Statement-based question regarding the current status of Planetary Boundaries.

claimText: Atmospheric Aerosol Loading and Stratospheric Ozone Depletion are the only Planetary Boundaries that have not been transgressed.
evidenceExcerpt: Atmospheric Aerosol Loading and Stratospheric Ozone Depletion have not been transgressed.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question identifying the exceptions among the boundaries.

claimText: Ocean Acidification has crossed its safe operating space for the first time according to the Planetary Health Check 2025.
evidenceExcerpt: Ocean Acidification crossed its safe operating space for the first time.
examUse: Statement-based question on recent changes in Planetary Boundaries.
distractorHooks: Stratospheric Ozone Depletion crossed for the first time
Ocean Acidification has always been transgressed
